title: TanStack cover
brief:
# Brief 1: TanStack 头图

A cinematic editorial cover image for a deep technical article about TanStack, a TypeScript web development ecosystem.

Visual concept: A vast modular workshop of interconnected precision tools laid out on a clean concrete surface under warm late-afternoon light. Each tool represents a different TanStack library: a sleek notebook (Query) with a glowing cache indicator, a finely-machined route compass (Router), a small but complete starter engine (Start), a typewriter (Form), a magnifying glass (Table), an AI assistant lens. The tools share visual language: brushed steel handles with a distinctive mint-green accent (the TanStack brand color #32E6E2). A single thin mint-green line weaves through the tools, connecting them like a network cable - suggesting composition, not monolith. Background: soft bokeh of an open editor with TypeScript code on the screen. Lighting: warm, grounded, slightly contemplative. No human figures. No text labels or logos in the image.

Style: cinematic-editorial, photorealistic, 35mm film still feel, shallow depth of field, restrained palette, warm afternoon light.

No text, no watermark, no captions in the image itself.
prompt:
Create an illustration titled 'TanStack cover'. Style: cinematic editorial still, dramatic but natural lighting, grounded scene details, documentary-like framing with an illustrative finish, no text labels, no diagrams. This is for an article or essay — not a technical document. Do NOT add any diagrams, arrows, labels, callouts, or text. Focus on a concrete visual idea with atmosphere, restraint, and editorial clarity. This is a WeChat Official Account headline cover image (公众号头条封面). Compose for a 2.35:1 ultra-wide crop (1080x460). Keep key subjects centered or in the bottom third — top area will be cropped. Design for readability as a small thumbnail in WeChat's subscription feed. Title text will be overlaid by the editor, so leave ample negative space. Language/region: en. Target aspect ratio: wechat-cover-hd. Mode: text-only. Brief:
